# terrible_awx_awx_job_launch (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Name of the job template to use.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `credential_passwords` (String) Passwords for credentials which are set to prompt on launch
- `credentials` (String) Credential names, IDs, or named URLs to use for job, only used if prompt for credential is set.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `diff_mode` (Boolean) Show the changes made by Ansible tasks where supported
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `execution_environment` (String) Execution environment name, ID, or named URL to use for the job, only used if prompt for execution environment is set.
- `extra_vars` (String) extra_vars to use for the Job Template. ask_extra_vars needs to be set to True via job_template module when creating the Job Template.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `forks` (Number) Forks to use for the job, only used if prompt for forks is set.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `instance_groups` (String) Instance group names, IDs, or named URLs to use for the job, only used if prompt for instance groups is set.
- `interval` (Number) The interval to request an update from the controller.
- `inventory` (String) Inventory name, ID, or named URL to use for the job, only used if prompt for inventory is set.
- `job_slice_count` (Number) Job slice count to use for the job, only used if prompt for job slice count is set.
- `job_timeout` (Number) Timeout to use for the job, only used if prompt for timeout is set. This parameter is sent through the API to the job.
- `job_type` (String) Job_type to use for the job, only used if prompt for job_type is set.
- `labels` (String) Labels to use for the job, only used if prompt for labels is set.
- `limit` (String) Limit to use for the *job_template*.
- `organization` (String) Organization name, ID, or named URL the job template exists in. Used to help lookup the object, cannot be modified using this module. If not provided, will lookup by name only, which does not work with duplicates.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `scm_branch` (String) A specific of the SCM project to run the template on. This is only applicable if your project allows for branch override.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `verbosity` (Number) Verbosity level for this job run
- `wait` (Boolean) Wait for the job to complete.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `status` (String) status of newly launched job
